notes: Top-level buckets come from featType in the feat compendium.
Metadata sub-buckets preserve existing feat-metadata.json categories.
UI sub-buckets reuse metadata and feat tags, then add the requested broad tags for General splitting.
Skill sub-buckets are per-skill tags inferred from existing metadata tags, feat tags, and feat text.
Feats can appear in multiple sub-buckets; top-level featType remains the primary category.
